summary: Iteration 8 tests for DNS check, Renew SSL, and restart-loop monitor all pass. Backend: 9/9 pytest tests green. Frontend: LE renew-ssl-btn visible on letsencrypt project, hidden on ssl_mode=none; check-dns-btn shows resolved IPs, server IP, and mismatch message; container-health-panel renders; dashboard loads without console errors.
critical_code_review_comments: restart_loop_monitor: consider exposing a health/status endpoint to inspect last-run timestamp and alert cooldown state; currently only observable via logs.

renew_ssl endpoint uses BackgroundTasks + returns 200 immediately — client cannot distinguish 'started' from 'succeeded'; consider surfacing status via existing deploy_logs poll (already possible via /logs) and document it in the UI toast.
dns_check does synchronous socket.getaddrinfo via asyncio.to_thread — good. get_server_ip caches indefinitely on process; fine here, but add TTL if the sandbox IP can change.
server.py: /dns-check and /renew-ssl are correctly declared BEFORE the catch-all POST /projects/{id}/{action} — confirmed no shadowing.
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted TESTPROJ_iter8_* (backend) and TESTUI_iter8_* (frontend) projects.
context_for_next_testing_agent: New endpoints verified: GET /api/projects/{id}/dns-check (with & without domain), POST /api/projects/{id}/renew-ssl (200 for letsencrypt, 400 for ssl_mode=none). DNS check for example.com returned resolved_ips=[104.20.23.154,172.66.147.243], server_ip=104.198.214.223, matches=false — correct behaviour. Renew SSL background task creates a deploy log with action='ssl' (verified via /logs). Restart-loop monitor task runs without exceptions (grepped backend.err.log — clean). Frontend Renew SSL button hidden when ssl_mode=none (verified). Prior iteration_7 features still regress-clean (project/health, system/containers-health, deploy graceful error).

verification_details.dns_check_domain: 200; domain=example.com, resolved_ips has 2 IPs, server_ip=104.198.214.223, matches=false
verification_details.renew_ssl_letsencrypt: 200 {ok:true, message:'SSL renewal started'}; ssl deploy log created within 3s
verification_details.renew_ssl_none_guard: 400 detail="Renew SSL only applies to Let's Encrypt mode"
verification_details.restart_monitor: No 'restart monitor' exceptions in backend logs; server healthy
verification_details.ui_renew_button_letsencrypt: renew-ssl-btn visible in header action row
verification_details.ui_check_dns: Clicking check-dns-btn renders dns-result box showing resolved IPs + server IP + '✗ Domain does not point here yet — update the DNS A record'
verification_details.ui_dashboard: Dashboard, CPU/MEM/DISK cards, Projects table with Containers column all render; no console errors
